data.title: Home Safety Expert Scott Jay of Springfield, Missouri Explains Dryer Fire Prevention in Multi-Unit Properties for HelloNation
data.description: Springfield, Mo., 24th March 2026 - To mitigate the risk of dryer fires in apartment buildings and vacation rentals in Springfield, Ozark, and Nixa, property managers are advised to focus on regular dryer vent cleaning. An article by HelloNation highlights the importance of this practice in preventing potential disasters. Taking proactive measures such as cleaning vents regularly can significantly reduce the likelihood of dryer fires. It is crucial for property managers to prioritize safety by ensuring that maintenance routines include this essential task.

data.title: Carrot Launches AI-Powered Global Price Monitoring System to Detect Fraud in Fertility Care Worldwide
data.description: Based on extensive data from the largest fertility pricing database globally, a new system has been introduced to identify billing misuse that conventional systems overlook. In Des Moines on March 24, 2026, it was reported that billions of dollars from employers are being directed towards fertility and family-building services. The majority of cases involve undetected billing issues, raising concerns about financial transparency in this sector.

data.title: Sidus Space to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results Conference Call on March 31 at 5:00 PM ET
data.description: In Cape Canaveral, Florida, on March 24, 2026, Sidus Space, Inc. (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed plans for their upcoming fourth quarter 2025 financial results conference call scheduled for 5:00 PM Eastern Time on Tuesday. Sidus, a pioneering space and technology firm, will provide insights regarding their performance during this period.

data.title: Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc. Announces Receipt of Regulatory Approvals For Merger with Home BancShares, Inc.
data.description: Today, in Knoxville, Tennessee, Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: MCBI), the parent company of Mountain Commerce Bank, a bank with a century-long history, disclosed that Home BancShares, Inc. has obtained the necessary approvals from the Board of Governors.

data.title: Velo3D Delivers Better-Than-Expected Q4 Results, Enters 2026 With 'Tremendous' Momentum
data.description: Velo3D Inc's (NASDAQ: VELO) latest fourth-quarter financial report showcased an impressive performance with revenue of $9.44 million, surpassing analyst projections of $8.68 million. The company also exceeded expectations for earnings, reporting an adjusted loss of 54 cents per share compared to an estimated loss of 56 cents per share. Despite a 5% decrease in revenue from 3D printers and parts sales year-over-year due to factors such as product mix and system sales volume, Velo3D remains optimistic about the future. The market responded positively to the news, leading to a surge in VELO stock prices. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sight Machine Named to Fast Company's List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Sight Machine Inc., a top industrial AI platform, has been honored for its innovation in manufacturing by being included in the list of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026 by Fast Company. The company, based in San Francisco, was recognized for its cutting-edge technology. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, through PRNewswire. This demonstrates the company’s position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: EnerSys to Participate in Jefferies Fireside Chat
data.description: EnerSys, a prominent player in stored energy solutions for industrial needs, disclosed that its President and CEO, Shawn O’Connell, and Executive Vice President and CFO, Andrea Funk, are set to engage in a fireside discussion led by Jefferies Power, Utilities, & Clean Energy Analyst, Julien Dumoulin-Smith, on Thursday, March 26th, at 2:00 pm ET. This event will be available for live viewing and later replay through a provided link. EnerSys is listed on NYSE as ENS.

data.title: HELP USA, Camber Property Group & NYC Department of Social Services Open First-of-Its-Kind Intake Center for Women Entering the Homeless Shelter System
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York, HELP USA, Camber Property Group, and the New York City Department of Social Services celebrated the unveiling of the HELP Women’s Center (HWC) at 114 Snediker Avenue in East New York. This new facility spans five stories, covering 60,000 square feet and accommodating 200 beds. Starting its services on March 30, 2026, the center will operate as an intake and assessment hub for women initiating their journey into the homeless shelter network. It is notably the city's inaugural site crafted exclusively for this function, bringing forth a new approach to assisting women in need.

data.title: Levi Strauss & Co. To Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) is set to hold a conference call on April 7, 2026, at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter financial results ending on March 1, 2026. The call will feature Michelle Gass, the president and CEO, and Harmit Singh, the chief financial and growth officer. To participate, registration is required via a provided link.

data.title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. Declares 2026 First-Quarter Cash Dividend
data.description: The quarterly dividend has been raised by 4.0% compared to the previous year, now standing at $0.23 per share.

data.title: Li Bang International Announces 1-for-100 Reverse Share Split
data.description: Li Bang International Corporation Inc., a leading provider of stainless steel commercial kitchen equipment in China, has revealed plans to conduct a reverse share split on a 1-for-100 basis for its ordinary shares. Traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol "LBGJ" (CUSIP: G5480M110), the Company's Class A ordinary shares will be available for trading post-split starting March 27, 2026. This move aims to streamline and enhance the company's market position and capital structure.
